page.title: Why MyFamTreeCollab?
page.intro: A modern, privacy-first family tree tool that grows with your needs. From free local management (basic account) to cloud collaboration (Owner account), you decide when and how.

privacy.tekst: Your family tree stays local in your browser by default. No required account, no tracking, no cloud unless you want it.

export.tekst: Your data is never locked in the system. Export anytime in open formats, even with a free basic account.

visualisatie.tekst: Build and view your family history visually. Available for every account type.

account.tekst: Start free as a basic account (guest) and grow to an Owner account via a small donation when you want to collaborate.

samenwerking.tekst: Collaborate with family members on one shared family tree. Only available for Owner accounts — you decide who has access.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.tekst: Start for free with a basic account or view the account types in detail.
